benchmarks.name: addr_calc_stride
benchmarks.description: Pure explicit address-generation stride walk over aligned u64 values
benchmarks.hypothesis: Isolates ADDR_CALC lowering via integer-address construction followed by u64 loads

benchmarks.name: multi_acc_4
benchmarks.description: Four-lane accumulator kernel with cross-lane mixing
benchmarks.hypothesis: More independent accumulators should reward ILP-friendly code generation

benchmarks.name: multi_acc_8
benchmarks.description: Eight-lane accumulator kernel with cross-lane mixing
benchmarks.hypothesis: Higher lane count should trade ILP gains against register pressure
